title: Enhanced Paintings
body:
# Enhanced Paintings # 

This pack takes the plain old Minecraft paintings and upgrades them into the Enhanced Default style. The result? Every wall you decorate instantly looks cleaner, sharper, and way more alive than before. It’s the same classic paintings you know, just refreshed to feel brand new.

Built as part of the Enhanced Default project, this overlay is made to fit perfectly with the vanilla game. Nothing feels out of place, yet everything looks better — it’s like giving Minecraft’s art a well-deserved polish without losing the original charm.

In the end, it’s a small overlay with a big impact. Your survival worlds feel more detailed, your bases look more stylish, and every painting suddenly has that extra touch of quality. Simple change, better experience — that’s what Enhanced Default is all about.
